attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
    REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          ,
    GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    ,
    BK_COMPANY_CD                 ,
    SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              ,
    AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY       ,
    BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CD            ,
    PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
    GL_DT                         ,
    GL_POSTED_DT                  ,
    TRANSFER_GROUP_TYPE_CD        ,
    TRX_FUNCTIONAL_CURR_CONV_DT   ,
    ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              ,
    RTE_DEAL_ID                   ,
    RTE_SOURCE_TYPE               ,
    RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_CRDT_AMT ,
    RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_CRDT_AMT  ,
    RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME       ,
    RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT   ,
    RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT     ,
    RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_DRTN_CNT   ,
    RU_RTE_CONTRACT_NUM           ,
    DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE             ,
    RU_MANUAL_REV_TRANSFER_TYPE_CD,
    RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       ,
    RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_DEBIT_AMT,
    RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_DEBIT_AMT ,
    EP_TRANSACTION_ID_INT         ,
    SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT           ,
    SK_AE_LINE_NUMBER_INT         ,
    ELEMENT_TYPE_CD               ,
    EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
    EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
    EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
    EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
    /*start: RTEQ1FY15*/ 
    OFFER_ATTRBTN_ID_INT          ,
    ATTRBTN_SS_CD                 ,
    DV_ATTRBTN_PRNT_SLSORD_LN_KEY ,
    ATTRBTN_CD             ,
    /*RTEQ1FY15: end */
    /*Start : Q1FY17 RTE XAAS*/
    SALES_AGENT_ACTIVE_DTM    ,     
    TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD  ,       
    BK_WEB_ORDER_ID   ,            
    SUBSCRIPTION_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT,
    /* Q1FY17 RTE XAAS : End */	
    SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT         		,
    ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY   		 ,
    POB_TYPE_CD /*NRS Change */,
	BUNDLE_TYPE_CD/*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
    FROM  $$WORKDB.W_REVENUE_TRANSFER WRTA  
    WHERE 
    DML_TYPE='I' AND 
    NOT EXISTS  (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRTA  
           WHERE NRTA.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY = WRTA.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY)
